question: What role and restaurant are identified for Adam Swanson on the blue banner in the first segment? A. Perfect Pasta B. Large Rigatoni C. Chef, Zucca D. SAN REMO

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with short grey hair wearing a maroon t-shirt and beige trousers stands in a kitchen gesturing with his hands. He holds a package of pasta and later arranges yellow food on a white plate situated on a wooden countertop. A stainless steel refrigerator stands behind him while metal pots hang on the wall to his left. A block of butter and a small bowl of creamy mixture sit near the plate.

Describe the sequence of actions the chef performs regarding the pasta and ingredients from the beginning to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the man holds a black frying pan over the stovetop; at 8s, a package of rigatoni pasta appears on the counter; at 10s, the chef holds the pasta bag with both hands; at 14s, a block of butter and small bowl appear on the wooden surface; at 18s, the man places a piece of food onto the white plate.

What does the man do with the black frying pan he is holding over the stove?
canonical_answer: He pours red chunky sauce from the pan onto the yellow rolled pasta.
